resources.string: No GPX files yet. Tap Import GPX to add one.
Feeding GPX to Android location services

GPS Simulator needs to be set as the system mock-location app.

1. Enable Developer Options (Settings → About phone → tap Build number 7 times).
2. Open Settings → System → Developer options.
3. Tap "Select mock location app" and choose GPS Simulator.
4. Come back here and try again.
Android requires location permission for an app to act as a mock-location provider. Grant precise location to continue.
